piptazo.brand_en: Tazocin Lyo-Injection 2000 mg piperacillin & 250 mg tazobactam/vial (Na 2.79 mEq/g potency)
piptazo.usual_dose: Bases on piperacillin content. Intermittent IF over at least 30 mins. Adults & children ≧ 40 kg, 3 g q6h; severe infection, 4 g q6h; max. 16 g/day. Children > 9 m/o, Children 2-9 m/o, 80 mg/kg q8h; severe infection, 300-400 mg/kg/day in q6h; max. 16 g/day. Infants UTI, adults, complicated: 2-4 g q6-8h; uncomplicated, 2-4 g q6-12h.
piptazo.indication: 對PIPERACILLIN具有感受性以及對PIPERACILLIN具抗藥性但對PIPERACILLIN／TAZOBACTAM有感受性之B－LACTAMASE產生菌株所引起之中至嚴重程度感染

brosym.brand_en: Brosym for Injection (cefoperazone sodium 1000 mg & sulbactam sodium 1000 mg)/vial (Na 5.4 mEq/vial)
brosym.usual_dose: IV. Bases on cefoperazone content. Adults, 500-1000 mg q12h; severe infection: 2000 mg q12h; MDRAB infection: please consult ID specialist for dosage adjustment. Children: 20-40 mg/kg/day in 2-4 doses; serious infection: 80 mg/kg/day in 2-4 doses.
brosym.indication: 適用於治療由感受性細菌所引起的下列感染：上、下呼吸道感染、上、下泌尿道感染、腹膜炎、膽囊炎、膽管炎及其他腹腔內感染、骨盆發炎、子宮內膜炎及其他生殖道感染、以及創傷燙傷、手術後之二次感染。
brosym.company: 臺灣東洋藥品工業股份有限公司

cefazolin.brand_en: Cefa for Injection 1000 mg cefazolin/vial (Na 2.1 mEq/g potency)
cefazolin.usual_dose: IV over 3-5 mins, intermittent or continuous IF or deep IM. Adults: Mild: 250-500 mg q8h. Moderate: 0.5-1 g q6-8h. Severe: 1-2 g q6h, up to 12 g/day. Perioperative prophylaxis: Preoperative: 1 g ( Intraoperative: Repeat dose every 4 hrs if needed. Postoperative: 0.5-1 g q6-8h for 24 hrs. Infants and children: Mild-moderate infections: 25-50 mg/kg/day in q6-8h; max. 1 g/dose. Severe infections: 100-150 mg/kg/day in q6-8h; max. 2 g/dose. Bacterial endocarditis: Prophylaxis: 50 mg/kg 30-60 mins prior to procedures; max. 1 g/dose. Treatment: 100 mg/kg/day in q6-8h; max. 2 g/dose, up to 6 g/day for severe cases. Neonates: ≦ 2 kg: 25 mg/kg q12h. > 2 kg: ≦ 7 d/o: 50 mg/kg q12h. 8-28 d/o: 50 mg/kg q8h.
cefazolin.max_dose: Adults: 12 g/dayInfants, Children and Adolescents: 2 g/dose
cefazolin.indication: 葡萄球菌、鏈球菌、肺炎雙球菌、腦膜炎球菌及其他具有感受性細菌引起之感染症

cefalexin.usual_dose: PO. Adults: 250-1000 mg q6h or 500 mg q12h; max. 4 g/day. Endocarditis prophylaxis: 2 g 30-60 mins prior to procedures. Uncomplicated cystitis (> 15 y/o): 500 mg q12h for 5-7 days (may extend up to 14 days if necessary). Children: Mild to moderate infections: 25-50 mg/kg/day in q6-8h. Severe infections: 75-100 mg/kg/day in q6-8h; max. 4 g/day. Otitis media: 75-100 mg/kg/day in q6h. Pharyngitis/tonsillitis, skin infections: 25-50 mg/kg/day in q12h × at least 10 days. Uncomplicated cystitis: > 15 y/o, 500 mg q12h × 7-14 days. Endocarditis prophylaxis: 50 mg/kg 30-60 mins prior to procedures; max. 2 g/dose.
cefalexin.indication: 有感受性細菌所引起之泌尿生殖道、呼吸道、柔組織及皮膚等感染症

cefuroxime.usual_dose: PO, take with food. Adults: General infections (skin, respiratory, sinusitis, pharyngitis): 250-500 mg bid. Uncomplicated UTIs: 250 mg bid × 7-10 days. Lyme disease: Erythema migrans or carditis: 500 mg bid × 14-21 days. Lyme arthritis: 500 mg bid × 28 days. Infants, children & adolescents: 20-30 mg/kg/day in q12h; max. 1 g/day.
cefuroxime.indication: 對廣範圍的革蘭氏陽性及革蘭氏陰性細菌有效，適用於治療對CEFUROXIME敏感的細菌所引起的上、下呼吸道、生殖泌尿道、皮膚，軟組織及淋病等感染症

ceftriaxone.brand_en: Cefin for IV Injection 500 mg ceftriaxone/vial (Na 3.6 mEq/g potency)
ceftriaxone.usual_dose: Intermittent IF over 15-30 mins in adults or 10-30 mins in pediatric patients or deep IM. Adults: 1-2 g/day in 1-2 doses. Meningitis: 2 g q12h; max. 4 g/day. Pelvic inflammatory disease (PID): Mild-Moderate: 500 mg IM once + doxycycline 100 mg PO bid +/- metronidazole 500 mg PO bid × 14 days. Severe PID: 1 g IV qd + doxycycline 100 mg PO bid + metronidazole 500 mg PO/IV bid × ≧ 14 days. Gonococcal infection: uncomplicated: 1 g IM once; disseminated Infection (DGI): 1 g IV qd × ≧ 7-14 days; meningitis, endocarditis : 1-2 g IV qd × 10-14 days or up to ≧ 4 weeks. Bacterial endocarditis prophylaxis in high-risk patients: 1 g IV/IM 30- 60 mins prior to procedures. Infants & children: Mild-moderate infection: 50-75 mg/kg qd; max. 1 g/day. Severe infection: 100 mg/kg/day in 1-2 doses; max. 4 g/day. Neonates: IM/IV 50 mg/kg q24h. Gonococcal infection: 25-50 mg/kg qd; max. 125 mg/dose. Meningitis: ≧ 14 d/o: 80-100 mg/kg qd.
ceftriaxone.indication: 葡萄球菌、鏈球菌、肺炎雙球菌、腦膜炎球菌及其他具有感受性細菌引起之感染症。

ceftazavi.indication: 適用於治療自出生起之兒童病人及成人病人對Zavicefta 具感受性的革蘭氏陰性微生物（susceptible Gram-negative microorganisms）所引起的下列感染： ．複雜性腹腔內感染(complicated intra-abdominal infection, cIAI) ．複雜性泌尿道感染(complicated urinary tract infection, cUTI)，包括腎盂腎炎(pyelonephritis) ．院內感染型肺炎(Hospital-acquired pneumonia, HAP)，包括呼吸器相關肺炎(ventilator associated pneumonia, VAP) 治療與上列任何感染相關，或疑似與上列任何感染相關之菌血症成人病人。應考量抗生素的使用準則來合理使用抗生素製劑。

cefepime.brand_en: Supecef Powder for Injection 500 mg cefepime/vial
cefepime.usual_dose: Intermittent IF over 30 mins or deep IM (for mild-moderate UTI only). Adults: UTI: mild-moderate, 0.5-1 g q12h; moderate-severe, 2 g q12h. Pneumonia: 1-2 g q12h, up to 2 g q8h for nosocomial infection.Skin/subcutaneous tissue infection or complicated abdominal infection: 2 g q12h. Other serious infections, e.g. meningitis, febrile neutropenia: 2 g q8h. Children 1 m/o-16 y/o: 50 mg/kg q12h; febrile neutropenia: 50 mg/kg q8h; max. 2 g/dose. Neonates: 30 mg/kg q12h, up to 50 mg/kg q12h. Meningitis/Pseudomonal infection: ≦ 14 d/o, 50 mg/kg q12h> 14 d/o, 50 mg/kg q8h1000-2000 g: ≦ 7 d/o, 50 mg/kg q12h> 7 d/o, 50 mg/kg q8h> 2000 g: 50 mg/kg q8h.

imipenem.usual_dose: 1. Experimental: MK-7655 250 mg with imipenem/cilastatin Participants randomized to receive MK-7655 250 mg will be administered 250 mg doses of MK-7655 IV in a blinded fashion once every 6 hours with each dose infused over a 30-minute interval. A 500 mg dose of imipenem/cilastatin will be administered in an open-label fashion once every 6 hours with each dose infused over a 30-minute interval. 2. Experimental: MK-7655 125 mg with imipenem/cilastatin Participants randomized to receive MK-7655 125 mg will be administered 125 mg doses of MK-7655 IV, in a blinded-treatment fashion once every 6 hours with each dose infused over a 30-minute interval. A 500 mg dose of imipenem/cilastatin will be administered IV in an open-label fashion once every 6 hours with each dose infused over a 30-minute interval. 3. Active Comparator: imipenem / cilastatin with placebo A 500 mg dose of imipenem/cilastatin will be administered IV in an open-label fashion once every 6 hours with each dose infused over a 30-minute interval. Participants randomized to receive imipenem/cilastatin alone will receive a placebo-matching infusion of IV normal saline (0.9%) once every 6 hours.
imipenem.indication: 臨床試驗:一項研究 MK-7655 + Imipenem/ Cilastatin（亞胺培南／西司他丁） 比較單獨使用Imipenem/ Cilastatin（亞胺培南/西司他丁）治療複雜性腹腔內感染[cIAI]病患的安全性、耐受性和療效的第 II 期、隨機、活性藥對照臨床試驗

ampsulbactam.usual_dose: Based on ampicillin content. IV over at least 10-15 mins, intermittent IF over 15-30 mins or deep IM. Adults & children ≧ 40 kg: 1-2 g q6-8h. Children Neonates: 100-150 mg/kg/day in q8-12h. High Dose for carbapenem resistant Acinetobacter (6-9 g of sulbactam/day) in adults: 2 g ampicillin/1 g sulbactam q4h IF 30 mins or 6 g ampicillin/3 g sulbactam q8h IF 4 hrs or 18 g ampicillin/9 g sulbactam continuous infusion.
ampsulbactam.indication: 鏈球菌、葡萄球菌、大腸桿菌、克雷氏菌、沙雷氏菌、流行感冒嗜血桿菌、吲哚陰性變形桿菌屬、檸檬酸菌屬、厭氧性細菌（ＢＡＣＴＥＲＯＩＤＥＳ ＦＵＳＯＢＡＣＴＥＲＩＵＭ， ＣＬＯＳＴＲＩＤＩＵＭ ＤＩＦＦＩＣＩＬＥ），ＢＲＡＮＨＡＭＥＬＬＡ ＣＡＴＡＲＲＨＡＬＩＳ 引起之感染症。

amoxclav.brand_en: Augmentin Powder for Oral Suspension 80 mg amoxicillin/mL, 2800 mg amoxicillin & 400 mg clavulanic acid/35 mL/btl
amoxclav.usual_dose: PO. Based on amoxicillin content. Community-acquired pneumonia (CAP), acute bacterial rhinosinusitis (ABRS), acute otitis media (AOM): High dose: 80-100 mg/kg/day in 2 doses; max. 4 g amoxicillin/day. Standard dose (only for susceptible S. pneumoniae): 45-60 mg/kg/day in 3 doses. UTI: Adults & children ≧ 40 kg: 875 mg q12h or 500 mg q8h. Children ≧ 2 m/o < 40 kg: 20-50 mg/kg/day in q8-12h.
amoxclav.indication: 葡萄球菌、鏈球菌、肺炎雙球菌、腦膜炎球菌及其他具有感受性細菌引起之感染症。

vancomycin.usual_dose: Intermittent IF ≧ 1 hr at a rate of ≦ 10 mg/min. Adults, (use actual body weight for obese patient) Loading dose: 20-25 mg/kg once (25 mg/kg in critical ill or ESRD); max. 3000 mg/dose. teicoplanin.usual_dose: IV 3-5 mins, intermittent IF over 30 mins or IM. Adults & adolescents: Pneumonia (CAP/ HAP), complicated skin & soft tissue infections, complicated UTI: Initially, 6-12 mg/kg q12h × 3 doses, then 6-12 mg/kg qd since D3. Septic arthritis, osteomyelitis, IE (streptococcal or S. aureus): loading 12 mg/kg q12h × 3-5 doses, then 12 mg/kg qd since D3 or D4. Surgical prophylaxis: 400-800 mg once, 30 mins prior to procedures. Children 2 m/o-12 y/o: loading 10 mg/kg q12h × 3 doses, then 6-10 mg/kg qd. For severe infections: 10-12 mg/kg q12h × 3 doses, then 10-12 mg/kg qd since D3. Infants < 2 m/o: loading 16 mg/kg IF, then 8-10 mg/kg IF qd since D2.

linezolid.indication: 治療由下列感受性菌株感染的患者：vancomycin 抗藥性的Enterococcus faecium感染，包括併發菌血症的病例。醫院感染的肺炎，由Staphylococcus aureus (對methicillin有感受性和對methicillin 有抗藥性的菌株) 或Streptococcus pneumoniae (對penicillin有感受性的菌株)所引起。複雜性皮膚和皮膚構造感染，包括糖尿病足感染，無併發骨髓炎，由Staphylococcus aureus (對methicillin有感受性和對methicillin 有抗藥性的菌株)，Streptococcus pyogenes或Streptococcus agalactiae所引起。非複雜性皮膚和皮膚構造感染，由Staphylococcus aureus (僅限於對methicillin有感受性的菌株)或Streptococcus pyogenes 所引起。社區感染的肺炎，由Streptococcus pneumoniae (僅限於對penicillin有感受性的菌株)，包括併發菌血症的病例，或Staphylococcus aureus (僅限於對methicillin有感受性的菌株) 所引起。(960906)

levofloxacin.usual_dose: Intermittent IF (250-500 mg over 60 mins; 750 mg over 90 mins). Adults, Healthcare-associated pneumonia (HAP): 750 mg qd. Acute bacterial sinusitis, community-acquired pneumonia (CAP): 750 mg qd x 5 days or 500 mg qd x 7-14 days. Acute bacterial exacerbation of chronic bronchitis, chronic bacterial prostatitis, Traveler’s diarrhea: 500 mg qd. Skin and skin structure infections (not S. aureus): Uncomplicated: 500 mg qd x 7-10 days. Complicated: 750 mg qd x 7-14 days. Urinary tract infections: Uncomplicated: 250 mg qd x 3 days. Complicated, including pyelonephritis: 250 mg qd x 10 days or 750 mg qd x 5 days. Tuberculosis: 500-1000 mg qd. Children, CAP, otitis media, acute (alternative agent): 5-16 y/o: 8-10 mg/kg qd; max. 750 mg/dose. < 5 y/o: 8-10 mg/kg q12h; max. 500 mg/dose.

gentamicin.usual_dose: Once-daily dosing (extended interval dosing), IV: 5-7 mg/kg once daily. Traditional/conventional dosing, IV or IM: Adults: 3-5 mg/kg/day in q8-12h (a loading dose 2-3 mg/kg IV could be given). Children ≧ 30 d/o: 2-2.5 mg/kg q8h. Synergy dosing (for gram-positive infections), IV or IM: 3 mg/kg/day in 1-3 doses, combined with a gram-positive agent. Neonates: ≦ 2 kg: ≦ 7 d/o: 5 mg/kg q48h; 8-28 d/o: 4 mg/kg q24h. > 2 kg: 4 mg/kg q24h.

azithromycin.usual_dose: PO. Community acquired pneumonia (CAP), Streptococcal pharyngitis, Streptococcal tonsillitis: Adults: 500 mg qd on day 1, then 250 mg qd on day 2-5; or 500 mg × 3 days. Children: 10-12 mg/kg qd on day 1 (max. 500 mg), 5-6 mg/kg qd on day 2-5; max. 250 mg/day; or 10-12 mg/kg qd × 3 days. Pertussis: Adults: 500 mg qd on day 1, then 250 mg qd on day 2-5. Children ≧ 6 m/o: 10 mg/kg qd on day 1 (max. 500 mg), 5 mg/kg qd on day 2-5; max. 250 mg/day. Children Mycobacterium avium complex (MAC), disseminated: Treatment & secondary prophylaxis: Adults: 500-600 mg qd + ethambutol 15 mg/kg qd. Children: 10-12 mg/kg (max. 500 mg) qd + ethambutol. Mycobacterium avium complex (MAC), lung disease: Nodular/bronchiectatic (three times weekly regimen): Adults: 500-600 mg TIW + ethambutol 25 mg/kg TIW + rifampin 600 mg TIW. Cavitary (daily regimen): Adults: 250-500 mg qd + ethambutol 15 mg/kg qd + rifampin 450-600 mg qd.
azithromycin.indication: 革蘭氏陽性、陰性及厭氧菌引起之下呼吸道感染(支氣管炎及肺炎)皮膚及軟褚組織感染、中耳炎、上呼吸道感染和性傳染病。

fosfomycin.name_zh: 優福乾粉注射劑 (弗斯黴素)
fosfomycin.usual_dose: IF, used as combination therapy. Adults & adolescents ≧ 12 y/o, > 40 kg: 2-4 g/day in 2 doses. Higher dose for severe infections caused by multidrug-resistant organism: 12-24 g/day in 2-3 doses. For bacterial meningitis: 16-24 g/day in 3-4 divided doses; max. 8 g/dose. Infants & children > 40 kg: 16-24 g/day in 3-4 doses; max. 8 g/dose. 10-40 kg: 200-400 mg/kg/day in 3-4 doses. < 10 kg: 200-300 mg/kg/day in 3 doses.
fosfomycin.indication: 綠膿菌、變形菌、沙雷氏菌、葡萄球菌、大腸桿菌等具有感受性細菌所引起下列感染症（敗血症、支氣管炎、細支氣管炎、支氣管擴張症、肺炎、肺化膿症、膿胸、腹膜炎、腎盂炎、膀胱炎）。
fosfomycin.company: 達富康國際有限公司(2019.4.9)聯邦化學製藥股份有限公司(old)

ceftolotazo.usual_dose: IF infused over 1 hr. Bases on ceftolozane content. Complicated urinary tract infection (cUTIs): Adults: 1000 mg q8h. Children: 20 mg/kg q8h; max. 1000 mg/dose. Complicated intra-abdominal infections (cIAIs)(in combination with IV metronidazole): Adults: 1000 mg q8h. Children: 20 mg/kg q8h; max. 1000 mg/dose. Pneumonia (HAP/VAP): Adults: 2000 mg q8h.
ceftolotazo.indication: 治療18歲（含）以上成人，患有對ceftolozane 與tazobactam 具感受性的致病菌所引起的以下感染症：(1) 複雜性腹內感染，需與metronidazole併用。 (2) 複雜性泌尿道感染，包括腎盂腎炎。 (3) 院內感染性肺炎，包括呼吸器相關肺炎。

tigecycline.usual_dose: Intermittent IF over 30-60 mins. Community-acquired pneumonia (CAP), complicated skin/skin structure infection (cSSTI), complicated intra-abdominal infection (cIAI): Adults: 100 mg once, then 50 mg q12h. Children ≧ 8 y/o: 1.5-2 mg/kg once, then 1-2 mg/kg q12h; max. 50 mg/dose. Multidrug-resistant (MDR) infections: Adults: 200 mg once, then 100 mg q12h as part of combination therapy. Children ≧ 8 y/o: Standard: 1.5-2 mg/kg once, then 1.2-2 mg/kg q12h; max. 50 mg/dose. High-dose (for carbapenem-resistant Enterobacterales): 4 mg/kg once (max. 200 mg), then 2-3.2 mg/kg q12h; max. 100 mg/dose.
tigecycline.indication: 對Tigecycline具有感受性之細菌所引起之複雜性皮膚及皮膚結構感染、複雜性腹腔內感染症及社區感染性肺炎。

Children > 27 kg: 1.2 MU once. Children ≦ 27 kg: 0.6 MU once.

acyclovir.usual_dose: PO. Genital Herpes: Initial episodes: Adults & children ≧ 12 y/o, 200 mg q4h while awake (5 times/day) × 10 days or 400 mg tid × 7-10 days. Children Recurrent episodes: Adults & children ≧ 12 y/o, 200 mg q4h while awake (5 times/day) × 5 days; 400 mg tid × 5 days or 800 mg bid × 5 days or 800 mg tid × 2 days. In HIV patients, 400 mg tid × 5-10 days or 7-14 days. Children Chronic suppression: Adults & children ≧ 12 y/o, immunocompetent, 400 mg bid; HIV infected, 400-800 mg bid or tid.Children Herpes zoster (shingles): Adults & children ≧ 12 y/o, 800 mg q4h (5 times/day) × 7-10 days; max. 4 g/day. Children with HIV & mild zoster, 20 mg/kg (max. 800 mg) qid × 7-10 days. Varicella zoster (chickenpox): Adults & children ≧ 2 y/o, 20 mg/kg (max. 800 mg) qid × 5 days. Initiated within 1st 24 hrs of rash onset. Children with HIV: 20 mg/kg (max. 800 mg) qid × 7 days or until no new lesions appear for 48 hrs. HSV orolabial disease (i.e. gingivostomatitis, herpes labialis): Infants, children & adolescents (non-HIV-infected), 20 mg/kg (max. 800 mg) qid × 5-7 days. Infants & children (HIV-infected), 20 mg/kg (max. 400 mg) qid × 7-10 days. Adolescents (HIV-infected), 400 mg tid × 5-10 days.
acyclovir.indication: 帶狀疱疹病毒引起之感染、單純疱疹病毒引起之皮膚黏膜感染、預防骨髓移植及白血病所引起之免疫不全病人之單純疱疹感染、復發性單純疱疹感染之抑制、水痘之感染。

oseltamivir.usual_dose: PO. Influenza A and B virus infections treatment: (initiated within 2 days of symptom onset) Adults: 75 mg bid × 5 days. Children & adolescents: > 40 kg, 75 mg bid × 5 days. > 23-40 kg, 60 mg bid × 5 days. > 15-23 kg, 45 mg bid × 5 days. ≦ 15 kg, 30 mg bid × 5 days. Infants ≧ 9 m/o: 3.5 mg/kg bid × 5 days. Infants Prevention of seasonal Influenza A and B virus infections: (initiated within 2 days of exposure) Adults: 75 mg qd × 10 days. Children & adolescents: > 40 kg, 75 mg qd × ≧ 7 days. > 23-40 kg, 60 mg qd × ≧ 7 days. > 15-23 kg, 45 mg qd × ≧ 7 days. ≦ 15 kg, 30 mg qd × ≧ 7 days. Infants 3-9 m/o: limited data, 3 mg/kg qd.
oseltamivir.indication: 成人和兒童（包含足月新生兒）的流行性感冒之治療。成人和1歲或以上兒童的流行性感冒之預防。

fluconazole.usual_dose: IF (rate ≦ 200 mg/hr). Urinary tract infection: 200 mg (3 mg/kg) qd, up to 400 mg (6 mg/kg) qd for pyelonephritis. Invasive candidiasis: Adults, 800 mg (12 mg/kg) on D1, then 400 mg (6 mg/kg) qd. Children, 25 mg/kg (max. 800 mg) on D1; then 12 mg/kg qd (max. 800 mg/day).Neonates, 25 mg/kg on D1, then 12 mg/kg qd. Cryptococcal meningitis: Adults: Induction, 400-800 mg qd + amphotericin B/flucytosine (or monotherapy, 800-1200 mg/day); Consolidation: 400-800 mg/day. Children: Induction, 12 mg/kg qd on D1, then 6-12 mg/kg qd; Consolidation, 6-12 mg/kg qd; max. 800 mg/day. Candidiasis of the esophagus: Adults, 200-400 mg (3-6 mg/kg) qd. Children, 6-12 mg/kg qd; max. 600 mg/day. Prophylaxis in high-risk ICU patients, stem cell transplant recipients with neutropenia, chemotherapy-induced neutropenia: Adults, 400 mg (6-12 mg/kg) qd; Children, 6 mg/kg qd; max. 400 mg/day. Prophylaxis in solid-organ transplant recipients: Adults, 200-400 mg (3-6 mg/kg) qd; Children: 3-6 mg/kg qd; max 400 mg/day. Prophylaxis for NICUs: birth weight < 1 kg (initiate within 48-72 hrs of birth): 3-6 mg/kg/dose twice weekly (for up to 6 weeks).

voriconazole.usual_dose: Invasive Aspergillosis, Candidiasis, Mycosis, Febrile neutropenia, Serious Mycosis: Adults & Children ≧ 15 y/o: loading 6 mg/kg IV q12h × 2 doses, then 4 mg/kg IV q12h or 200-300 mg PO bid or 3-4 mg/kg PO bid. Children 1 m/o - 14 y/o, ≧ 50 kg: loading 6 mg/kg IV q12h × 2 doses, then 4 mg/kg IV q12h or 200-300 mg PO bid or 3-4 mg/kg PO bid. Children 1 m/o - 14 y/o, Neonates, PNA ≦ 28 d/o: IV 6 mg/kg q12h. Candidiasis of the esophagus, Oropharyngeal candidiasis: Adults & Children ≧ 12 y/o: ≧ 40 kg, 200 mg bid; < 40 kg, 100 mg bid × 14-21 days.

micafungin.usual_dose: Slow IF over 1 hr. Invasive Aspergillosis, Candidiasis: Adults, 100 mg qd; max. 150 mg qd. Children ≧ 9 y/o, ≦ 40 kg: 2-3 mg/kg qd; > 40 kg: 100 mg qd. Children 2-8 y/o, 15-40 kg: 3-4 mg/kg qd. Infants ≧ 4 m/o, 7-15 kg: 5-7 mg/kg qd. Neonates, Infants Prophylaxis of Candida infection in hematopoietic stem cell transplantation: Adults, 50-100 mg qd. micafungin.indication: 1. 治療4個月以上兒童與成人病人的念珠菌血症、急性播散性念珠菌病、念珠菌腹膜炎及膿瘍。 2. 治療未滿4個月兒童病人的念珠菌血症、急性播散性念珠菌病、未合併腦膜腦炎和/或眼擴散之念珠菌腹膜炎及膿瘍。 3. 治療4個月以上兒童與成人病人的食道念珠菌感染症。 4. 預防接受造血幹細胞移植 (HSCT) 的4個月以上兒童與成人病人的念珠菌感染症。

tmpsmx.usual_dose: Contraindication: Infants But PJP prophylaxis can begin at 1 m/o. PO. Dosage expressed in terms of the trimethoprim content. Adults: 160 mg q12h. Children ≧ 2 m/o: 6-12 mg/kg/day in 2 doses. Pneumocystis jiroveci (previous Pneumocystis carinii) pneumonia: Adults, children ≧ 2 m/o: 15-20 mg/kg/day in 3-4 doses for 14-21 days. Prevention of P. jiroveci pneumonia or toxoplasmosis in HIV patients: Adults & adolescents: 80-160 mg qd or on 3 consecutive days/wk. Children ≧ 2 m/o, 5-10 mg/kg/day or 150 mg/m2/day for 3-7 days per week; administered as q12h doses for 3 consecutive or alternating days, or as a qd dose for 3 consecutive days; max. 320 mg/day. Acute Otitis Media: Children ≧ 2 m/o: 8 mg/kg/day in q12h. GI Infections, respiratory tract infections, UTI: Adults: 160 mg q12h. Children ≧ 2 m/o: 8-10 mg/kg/day in q12h. UTI prophylaxis: Adults: 40-80 mg qd or 3 times weekly. Children ≧ 2 m/o: 2 mg/kg qd or 5 mg/kg twice weekly.
